title: Create: Alloys
description: This mod adds various netherite alloys and ores from the create.
body:
Create: Alloys is a major expansion for the Create mod that bridges the gap between advanced engineering and vanilla endgame materials. Forget standard netherite; it’s time to fuse the raw power of ancient debris with the versatility of brass, zinc, and charged rose quartz.
Unlock the true potential of your kinetic machinery and forge next-generation gear with unprecedented capabilities!
**🚀 Key FeaturesAdvanced Metallurgy**: 
- Melt and alloy Netherite with core components from Create (Brass, Zinc, and Rose Quartz) to craft high-tier composite materials.
- Upgraded Arsenal: Forge everything from high-tech tools to heavy-duty custom armor sets tailored for automated warfare and survival.
- Smithing Templates: Utilize dedicated Zinc & Brass templates to streamline your gear upgrading process.
- Modpack Ready: Perfectly balanced recipes make this mod an excellent and seamless addition to any tech-focused or progression-based modpack.
**Warning! The mod will not work properly without [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)**
